heading: Acquisition and sale of land
label: 701c–2 Acquisition and sale of land
text: The provisions of sections 593 to 595 of this title relating to river and harbor improvements are made applicable to works of flood control heretofore or hereafter authorized.
notes: Amendments1951—Act , struck out “558a and” in the reference to other sections.Oct. 31, 1951
amendments: Amendments1951—Act , struck out “558a and” in the reference to other sections.Oct. 31, 1951
